steps: Fight the Bloated Miller in the corner opposite the entrance. Stay above 35 life for his slam.
Clear adds while focusing the Bloated Miller.
Fight him away from the entrance so you can pass the blockage and enter town immediately after.
Grab your skill gem and kill Beira of the Rotten Pack. Skip the Mud Burrow.
League mechanic here gives a transmute — only do it if you run into it naturally.
After Beira you get permanent +10% cold resist. Head to The Grelwood.
Follow the river upstream — it always leads to The Red Vale.
Follow the glowing roots to the Tree of Souls.
Mushrooms mark the nearby entrance to The Grim Tangle.
Pick up the guaranteed support gem from Areagne, Forgotten Witch.
Respawn at her checkpoint so nearby monsters are cleared before the fight.
Ignore most monsters while crossing the zone.
Grab The Grim Tangle checkpoint and continue to The Red Vale.
League mechanic reward is a level 2 skill gem.
Clear both obelisks, pick up runes, and reach level 4.
Swap in the flasks from the checkpoint hut.
Kill The Rust King after activating all three obelisks.
Portal to town: identify rares, clear inventory, grab quest items from Renley.
Return to The Grelwood, place the spikes in the tree, then go to The Grim Tangle.
Portal to town and talk to Oona.
Return to The Grim Tangle and talk to Oona again.
Stand next to the checkpoint to pass the blockage.
Head straight to the boss for a guaranteed support gem.
Fungal zombies explode on death; do not stand on corpses.
The boss teleports — wait for him to reappear before committing.
Take the support gem and move on to the Cemetery of the Eternals.
Key objectives: Tomb of the Consort, league mechanic (regal orb), Mausoleum of the Praetor, and the Sarcophagus ring.
Tomb of the Consort rare mob: stay close and do not hit while his shield is up.
Find the Mausoleum boss quickly — she teleports during the fight.
Checkpoint to the Mausoleum and fight Draven, the Eternal Praetor.

groups.zone: Cemetery of the Eternals — Draven & Lachlann
steps: Draven, the Eternal Praetor moves constantly — best damage window is when he stabs the ground for his wave attack.
Back at the cemetery waypoint: open the gate, respawn at checkpoint for an instant boss spawn.
Count Lachlann the Lost drops a ring that triggers a long cutscene — leave it on the ground; you unlock the Hooded One at the end of Act 1 anyway.
Enter the Hunting Grounds.
Signpost on the main path points toward Ogham Farmlands.
Follow the pecked-at bovine trail to Crowbell.
Take the level 3 skill gem from Lachlann the Lost.
Main goal: Crowbell for two passive points.
Optional: Dryad ritual for a free support gem if you find it.
Completing the ritual spawns a locust trail leading to Freythorn.
Complete the league mechanic for a guaranteed exalted orb.
Hit Crowbell while running to the second arena to speed up his pathing.
Each completed ritual spawns a locust trail to the next closest ritual.
Complete all three rituals, then kill the boss for 30 spirit.
If you find the boss early, follow the dark energy streams from the altar to the remaining rituals.
The boss teleports often — hold off until after a teleport.
Pick up the gem bloom skull (+30 permanent spirit) and a spirit gem.
Town: Finn for a charm, Una for greater life and mana flasks.
Return to Hunting Grounds and checkpoint to the Ogham Farmlands.
Two weapon set passive points from Una's lute — turn them in later.
Get a level 4 skill gem from the league mechanic or the crop circle rare mob.
Continue to Ogham Village.
Grab smithing tools to unlock the salvage bench.
Open the blacksmith's chest for a blank rune and an artificer orb.
Kill the Executioner. While loot is dropping, pull the lever, then grab everything.
Talk to Leitis before leaving.
Town: turn in Una's loot for two weapon set passive points.
Pick up a greater life flask if you do not have one yet.
Turn in the blank rune at Renley for a lesser storm rune.
Grab your level 5 skill gem.
Click the corpse for a level 1 support gem — click and move away immediately so it drops beside you for instant pickup.
League mechanic: orb of alchemy.
Candlemass, the Living Rite: permanent +20 maximum life from Candlemass' Essence.
Count Geonor: at half health he phases briefly — dodge and wait it out.
Optional: raided camp for a free tier 2 support gem.
League mechanic rewards an exalt — worth detouring if you are low on currency.
Kill Rathbreaker.
Portal to town, talk to Asala, then use the desert map toward The Halani Gates.
Once you have the quest state, teleport out immediately.
Use the desert map to reach Mawdun Quarry.
Guaranteed artificer orb somewhere along a wall — grab it if you pass it, do not backtrack.
Respawn at checkpoint on entry to skip the elevator.
Kill Rudja, the Dread Engineer and rescue Risu.
Talk to Risu and drop a portal while waiting for loot.
Town: talk to Risu and Asala, then move to Traitor's Passage.
Traitor's Passage has a guaranteed fork — one path to Balbala, the Traitor, one to the exit.
Follow the Maraketh parchment to reach Balbala (optional — many runners skip her and go to Deshar instead).
Watchful Twins: two rare mobs drop a guaranteed Djinn Barya for your first ascension.
Guaranteed level 6 skill gem from Rudja, the Dread Engineer in Mawdun Mine.
The Halani Gates bridges: do not run too far ahead on the first bridge or Asala can get stuck.
Before the second bridge, respawn at checkpoint to reset Asala if needed.
Kill Jamanra, the Risen King at The Halani Gates.
After Jamanra, take the elevator down, follow the wind for quest progress.
Enter Mastodon Badlands.
Abysses give currency but are optional; Lightless Passage is also skippable for now.
Relic drops only from hyenas — if you reach the end without it, backtrack to missed packs without resetting checkpoint.
Follow the entrance direction to reach the boss.
Dual-boss fight: position to the side so you can hit both.
Continue to Keth.
Two weapon set passive points from Kabala, Constrictor Queen.
Guaranteed amulet in a side room.
Kill snakes here and in the next zone — they drop the +1 charm relic.
Giant beetle jewel is optional — many runners skip straight to Buried Shrines.
Buried Shrines league mechanic: guaranteed lesser jeweller's orb — detour if you miss it naturally.
Elemental offering: resistance ring and matching rune — take whichever resist you need most.
Kill the boss, then immediately start the Essence of Water animation.
Run back for loot, grab the essence, then head to town.
Activate the three seals and place relics for the passive bonus.

groups.zone: Valley of the Titans & The Titan Grotto
steps: Three giant Titan heads mark the area — each hides a linear canyon entrance.
Reach the end of a canyon, activate the seal, then use the portal back to the hub.
Grab The Titan Grotto checkpoint near the start.
If behind on XP, the abyss here can give almost a full level.
Guaranteed runes along the path only — do not go out of your way.
Sound the horn in town, then navigate to Deshar.
Guaranteed artificer orb along a wall; Watchful Twins drop a Djinn Barya (optional second ascension).
Pick up the Final Letter — exchange in town later for two weapon set passive points.
Use movement skills to skip broken bridges on the way to Deshar.
Permanent +10% lightning resist from the Sisters of Garukhan.
Exchange the Final Letter with Shambrin for two weapon set passive points.
Fight Tor Gul, the Defiler in The Spires of Deshar, then continue to The Dreadnought.
Kill Jamanra, the Abomination on The Dreadnought.
Town: talk to the Hooded One, log out and back in to return to the caravan.
Talk to Asala to move to Act 3.
Talk to explorer camps in the jungle — they point toward the next area (shown on the minimap).
League mechanic: tier 3 support gem.
Lesser jeweller's orb from the Azak fire chest.
Enter Jungle Ruins.
The Matlan Waterways entrance is now in Jungle Ruins.
Alternate exit from The Venom Crypts shortcuts back through the jungle.
Kill the monkey for extra passive points.
Guaranteed rare gloves from a chest next to the NPC.
League mechanic: orb of alchemy.
Jungle grave: click the ravaged corpse to summon Servi, grab a free rare belt.
Pick up corpse snake venom and return it to Servi for a passive reward.
Pick up the waypoint and cross the zone.
Guaranteed rare boots from a chest next to an NPC.
Trial of Chaos is optional.
Side rewards (amulet, random rare chest) only if you pass them naturally.
Pick up a soul core to progress through Jiquani's Machinarium.
Follow the main corridor through blockages.
Permanent +10% fire resist from The Flame Core (Blackjaw, the Remnant) before Jiquani's Sanctum.
The Azak Bog is now accessed from The Matlan Waterways.
The Azak Bog flame-skin ritual: clear most mobs, respawn at checkpoint, repeat for fast XP.
Boss drops a spear and a gem rot skull — trade the spear to Servi for a charm.
Run one direction to find the checkpoint, then reset and explore the other way for soul cores.
After placing the second soul core, respawn at checkpoint and return to the start for the boss.
Pick up the large soul core and take it back to the Infested Barrens.
Pull levers through The Matlan Waterways to drain Utzaal.
Place a portal before the final lever interaction to save a few seconds.
Talk to Alberta to enter. Pick up the waypoint — you will need it later.
Start with the Molten Vault to unlock the Reforging Bench.
Town: talk to Oswald to unlock reforging, then proceed to the Apex of Filth.
Apex of Filth: mostly empty — ignore mushroom quest items and Cauldron Keeper.
Boss rolling slam requires a dodge roll as she lands.
Grab the quest item and checkpoint back to the waypoint.
Second-floor stairs: 50% chance in the far corner past the central sun — check there first, then reset and check others.
Second floor exit follows the crack in the ground from the central sun to the wall.
Summon Alva and start dialogue — portal out as soon as she says "offering".
Kill every Goliath — they are the only source of sacrificial hearts.
Kill Viper Napuatzi in Utzaal.
Tier 3 support gem reward.
Aggorat second half: sacrificial altar for two passive points.
Sacrificial heart may only drop from Goliaths in the second half — farm there if needed.
Kill Doryani, Royal Thaumaturge — dodge the laser ring in phase 1.
Portal to town, talk to Doryani and Alva, proceed to Act 4.
From Kedge Bay, head straight to Journey's End.
Get Captain Hartland's quest item (Verisium), TP to town, exchange with Danig for Verisium spikes.
Waypoint back and start the Delirium encounter.
Clear monsters and kill Omniphobia for two passive points and Delirium currency.
Return to ship and sail to the Isle of Kin.
Fossilized formation along outer walls may contain a lesser jewel.
Greater rune from The Blind Beast.
Volcanic Warrens: kill fire golem last for a ruby ring, or lightning golem last for a topaz ring. Do not skip.
Kill Krutog, Lord of Kin, then sail to Ngakanu.
Skip the shark pit — reward is not worth the time.
Find the Beckoning Clam for a humming pearl — trade to Rogue for an all-resist amulet at the boss.
Sail to Abandoned Prison.
Chapel key from a necromancer, then choose life flask recovery over mana.
Hug the ocean wall to avoid dead ends; use movement skills through barred walls.
Boss: stand near a ballista and activate it when prompted.
Town: amulet from Rogue, greater storm rune from Danig.
Talk to NPC to unlock the Eye of Hinekora.
Defeat Warriors of Ngamahu, Taoha, and Tasalio.
Well interaction: +5% maximum mana, then checkpoint and continue.
Totem waves drop tattoos — use for +5 resists or +5 attributes; resists recommended.
Defeat Yama the White for a silver coin — exchange with Navali for two passive points.
Sail to Arastas. Talk to NPC, enter, exit, wait for cutscene.
Break the barrier by attacking the bubble. Kill all monsters before resetting checkpoint.
Pick up both bells — one gives three exalts, the other three regals.
Tavros: when he picks up a rock, stand near a priest so the rock removes the buff.
At 50% HP he becomes immune and drops rocks — wait for vulnerability to return.
When "speak to the Hooded One" appears, checkpoint and portal to town.
League mechanic: greater jeweller's orb.
Hug the right wall to find Heart of the Tribe.
Kill Tavakai, the Chieftain.
Return to town and head to Interlude 2.
Kill the two right-side bosses, then town for two weapon set passive points from Risu.
Top-right entrance, head north; if blocked, go left for +5% maximum life.
Hug the left wall to The Galai Gates waypoint, then Pools of Khatal and Sel Khari Sanctuary.
Place two barriers in outer-wall pedestals to choose one of four amulets and one of four rings.
Talk to Asala, return to town, waypoint to The Galai Gates.
Complete the Ritual of Water at Qimah Reservoir for a passive (usually all resists).
Optional vials on wells for high-tier currency.
Kill Azmadi, the Faridun Prince at Qimah Reservoir.
After Ashen Forest, reach Kriar Village.
Kill Lythara, the Wayward Spear.
Gemcrust Skull reward: +40 spirit and a tier 14 spirit gem.
Glacial Tarn: hug the right wall to Howling Caves.
Icy Tusks from The Abominable Yeti — give to Hilda for two weapon set passive points.
Kill Rakkar, the Frozen Talon and Stormgore, the Guardian, then Zelina, Blood Priestess and Zolin, Blood Priest.
Town: Hooded One to enter the final interlude.
Checkpoint next to the darkness, kill two bosses to unlock Stones of Serle.
Click all six stones, then fight Siora, Blade of the Mists in the center.
Wait for Oona, finish dialogue, wait for quest state, enter Scorched Farmlands.
Checkpoint back to darkness, enter The Blackwood.
Ignore omen chests. Head left to Holten.
Soul of the Ferryman sells greater runes.
Fight Oswin, the Dread Warden for two weapon set passive points.
Checkpoint to Holten, continue to Holten Estate.
Loop around to stairs on the left; second floor uses a similar path.
Kill Lady Elswyth first, then clean up the rest.
Town: talk to Renley, waypoint to Act 4, passive points from Hooded One.
Travel to Oreth. Talk to Alva — you are ready for your first map.
